name: SIYI Technology
notes: Chinese manufacturer. ZR10 (10x optical), ZR30 (30x optical), A8 series. Lightweight options.

name: Viewpro
notes: Chinese manufacturer. Multiple zoom gimbal models including Q10F, U30TIRM Pro (30x). Also OEM supplier.

name: Topotek
notes: Chinese manufacturer founded 2012. 10x-90x zoom cameras, multi-sensor gimbals.

name: DJI
notes: Chinese manufacturer. Zenmuse H20 (15x zoom, 678g), Zenmuse H30 (34x zoom, 920g).

name: Foxtech
notes: Chinese manufacturer. EH26 (26x), EH30 (30x), SEEKER-30 (30x), SYK-30 AI (30x, 770g).

name: Gremsy
notes: Vietnamese manufacturer. Zio (20x optical), Vio (20x optical), Orus L (25x).

name: Yangda
notes: Chinese manufacturer. Sky Eye series (10x-40x), Storm Eye series (30x-40x).

name: Zingto
notes: Chinese manufacturer. INYYO series: Q12X (10x), Q350 (30x).

name: Edge Autonomy
notes: US manufacturer (formerly Octopus ISR). E95 (570g), E140, E180. Up to 30x zoom.

name: Controp
notes: Israeli manufacturer. EO/IR gimbals for UAVs. Military/defense.

name: CUAV
notes: Chinese manufacturer. Q10F (10x optical, 413g). Uses Viewpro OEM.

name: Threod Systems
notes: Estonian manufacturer. Shark gimbal for small UAVs.

name: Sky-Drones
notes: UK-based. Offers payloads with 10x/20x/30x optical zoom.

name: Savgood Technology
notes: Chinese OEM. Zoom camera modules for UAVs.

name: Digital Eagle
notes: Chinese manufacturer. Tracking cameras for UAVs.

name: Autel Robotics
notes: Chinese/US. EVO Max 4T has 10x zoom but gimbals not sold separately for third-party drones.
